content.text:
[
  {
    "ruleId": "V-RHYTHM",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "advisory",
    "where": "section 'What does a taste look like as numbers?', three separate sentences",
    "evidence": "'A prediction you can be wrong about is worth ten definitions you nod along to.' ... 'Similarity, it turns out, has a basement.' ... 'The number measures which way two arrows point, not what the things are.'",
    "suggestion": "Keep the strongest of the three (the direction/basement pairing) and let the other land as plain explanation; one mic-drop per section, not three."
  },
  {
    "ruleId": "V-REGISTER",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "advisory",
    "where": "beat 1, paragraph 4",
    "evidence": "'One answer to it runs half of modern machine learning.'",
    "suggestion": "'One answer to it shows up all over modern machine learning' or drop the sweeping fraction and let the build itself carry the stakes."
  }
]
